title: Self-tailored male genital stimulator
abstract: A kit for an adjustable stimulator for male genitalia comprises a cylindrical core having a cylindrical axis and an opening on its surface, a vibratory module having at least one vibrating unit thereon, a mount for mounting the vibratory module on the interior of the core, and a plurality of penetration lips for application to a selected end of the core, each of the plurality of lips having an annular opening of differing diameters, whereby a user is able to configure the stimulator to accommodate the dimensions of the user's erection.
claims: 1. An adjustable stimulator for male genitalia, comprising: a cylindrical core having an opening therethrough and a cylindrical axis, said opening being offset along said cylindrical axis such that said opening is closer to a first end of said core than a second end of said core; a penetration lip having an annular opening and adapted to be placed on one of said first and second ends of said core; a vibratory module having at least one vibrating unit and adapted to be placed in said opening of said core such that said at least one vibrating unit is located within the interior of said core, said at least one vibrating unit being offset on said vibratory module along said cylindrical axis such that it is closer to a first end of said vibratory module than to a second end of said vibratory module; whereby said at least one vibrating unit can be located at one of four discrete distances along said cylindrical axis relative to said penetration lip depending upon (i) whether said penetration lip is placed on said first or second end of said core, and (ii) the orientation of said vibratory module within said opening of said core, to thereby accommodate male members of different lengths.
